what_to_test: Test urgency framing in the headline: 'FINAL CALL — $20 Certificate Dies Tonight' vs. 'Your Colleagues Are Already Certified — Are You?' to determine whether scarcity-fear or social-superiority-fear drives higher CTR with the 28-50 knowledge worker segment.
competitor_context: Coursera and LinkedIn Learning run occupation-gap angles emphasizing career advancement and salary uplift, but lead with credential prestige and long course durations — this creative differs by weaponizing time-loss shame combined with hard deadline urgency at a disruptively low $20 price anchor.
risk: The triple pressure of urgency + inferiority + low price may trigger skepticism in high-earning professionals 35-50 who associate $20 certification with low credibility, potentially undermining the 'superiority' desire the LF8 driver is meant to activate.
